case_title: ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC VS. JIA LIANG et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $253.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, JIA
